---
title: "CV"
---

# Curriculum Vitae

<ul>
  <li><a href="assets/Arroyo_Chavez_CV.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">View CV (PDF)</a></li>
</ul>

## Short academic bio

Griselda Arroyo is a postdoctoral researcher in astrophysics at the University of Arizona. Her work focuses on star formation, the interstellar medium, filamentary structure, angular momentum transport, and synthetic observations from numerical simulations.

## Education

- PhD in Astrophysics — Institution, Year  
- MSc in ...  
- BSc in ...

## Appointments

- Postdoctoral Research Associate, Steward Observatory, University of Arizona  
- Previous appointment

## Awards and support

- Fellowship / grant / travel support

## Teaching, mentoring, and outreach

- Mentoring experience
- Workshops or summer schools
- Outreach activities
